# Code Anchors: Command Input

- `apps/prime/app/terminal/terminal-region.tsx` — mounts the raw-edit editor as the live input line, outside the recede filter, wired to submit into the overlay's surfaced-command slot; renders the surfaced command verbatim.
- `apps/prime/app/terminal/terminal-region.spec.tsx` — command input, submit hand-off, and verbatim-rendering behavior verification.
- `apps/prime/app/layout/overlay.tsx` — the `submitCommand` action consumed by the command input.
- `apps/prime/vite.config.ts` — pre-declares the editor's transitive dependencies in dev-server dependency optimization, avoiding a cold-start reload storm that could drop an in-flight keystroke.
